certifications: RH124 – Red Hat System Administration I

projects.title: Food Delivery Surge Pricing Analyser
projects.subtitle: Snowflake Tech Stack
projects.description: Developed a real-time surge pricing analytics platform using Snowflake, Snowpark Python, SQL and Streamlit to simulate demand-based pricing. Generated synthetic delivery order data using Snowpark and stored it in Snowflake tables. Implemented SQL-based surge pricing logic using aggregations, CASE statements and time-window analysis. Built an interactive Streamlit dashboard to visualize delivery demand, surge multipliers and pricing trends.

projects.title: AI-Driven Framework for Air Quality Prediction and Precautionary Recommendations
projects.subtitle: Python, TensorFlow, LSTM, Scikit-learn
projects.description: Developed an air quality prediction framework using LSTM and Multiple Linear Regression to forecast PM2.5, PM10, NO2, SO2, CO and O3 concentrations. Performed data preprocessing, normalization and feature engineering on environmental datasets to improve model performance. Achieved an R2 score of 0.967 for pollutant prediction and an adjusted R2 score of 0.881 for health impact assessment. Built a recommendation module that generated precautionary health advisories based on predicted AQI levels.

projects.title: Gut Microbiome-based Cardiovascular Prediction using Random Forest
projects.subtitle: Python, Scikit-learn, Random Forest
projects.description: Developed a Random Forest model to predict cardiovascular disease risk using gut microbiome datasets. Achieved 88.9% classification accuracy through feature preprocessing, model training and evaluation. Performed data preprocessing and model evaluation using Python and Scikit-learn. Co-authored and presented the research paper at the 21st Control Instrumentation Systems Conference (CISCON 2024).
